results.title: Noah Lyles clocks 9.88-second 100m victory, his fastest time since 2024 Olympics: 'I'm here to win'
results.description: Lyles won with daylight, producing the second-quickest time of any sprinter in 2026, behind only Kayinsola Ajayi (9.84s) of Nigeria.

results.title: “Canada is not prepared to host a World Cup” — José Carlos Silva
results.description: With decades of connection to Luso-Canadian soccer, and to Gil Vicente Toronto in particular, José Carlos Silva looks at the 2026 World Cup with a mix of enthusiasm and skepticism. ...

results.title: LIVE BLOG: Golden Knights vs. Hurricanes Game 2 live score, updates, highlights
results.description: The Golden Knights look for the road sweep against the Hurricanes in Game 2 of the Stanley Cup Final on Thursday at Raleigh, North Carolina. Follow for live updates.

results.title: Four-wicket Robinson sparks New Zealand collapse in 1st test after England slump

results.title: Trump to attend NBA Finals Game 3 in New York
results.description: President Trump said Thursday that he has accepted an invitation from New York Knicks owner James Dolan to attend an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next week.
